items.title: Project TT: Developing a 20mm Biohybrid Tripod Driven by Cerebral Organoids
items.summary:
Hello everyone,

I want to share a project proposal I’ve developed for a 20 mm biohybrid soft robotic platform called the Tripodal Thinker (Project TT).

items.title: Logging and Observability Guide Discussion | Cloud Robotics WG Meeting 2026-06-15
items.summary: Please come and join us for this coming meeting at Mon, Jun 15, 2026 4:00 PM UTC→Mon, Jun 15, 2026 5:00 PM UTC, where we will be discussing Logging & Observability tips and best practices. The group has been researching in this area for the past several month

items.title: Walmart, Wing add 7 markets in drone delivery expansion
items.summary:
Wing plans to bring drone deliveries to Memphis, New Orleans, Philadelphia, Phoenix, San Diego, San Francisco, and Salt Lake City.

The post Walmart, Wing add 7 markets in drone delivery expansion appeared first on
